guarantee.title: Our Guarantee
guarantee.description: We're so confident you'll love our service that we offer a 30-day money-back guarantee. If you're not satisfied, we'll refund your payment, no questions asked.

questions.question: How does the free trial work?
questions.answer: Start your free trial immediately after signup. You'll have full access to all features for 24 hours, no credit card required.

questions.question: What devices are supported?
questions.answer: Our service works on Smart TVs, Android devices, iOS devices, Fire Stick, Roku, and web browsers.

questions.question: Is there a contract or commitment?
questions.answer: No contracts or commitments. You can cancel anytime and we offer a 30-day money-back guarantee.

questions.question: How many devices can I use?
questions.answer: Each plan includes support for multiple devices. Premium plans support up to 5 simultaneous streams.

questions.question: What payment methods do you accept?
questions.answer: We accept all major credit cards, PayPal, and cryptocurrency payments for your convenience.

questions.question: Is the service legal and safe?
questions.answer: Yes, our service is completely legal and safe. We use industry-standard encryption to protect your data.
